text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Whew... I only intended to do some light solo
training today, but I ended up running a
substantial distance.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
There are so many huge dump trucks here. I
wonder if they're doing construction work.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, I used to love watching the
dump trucks at construction sites when I was
young...

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text: Whoa, awesome! It's so big and strong!

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text:
Mommy! When I grow up, I want to be a dump
truck!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I must admit that was quite a peculiar aspiration...
Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Still, a dump truck's design cannot be faulted.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The solid center of gravity allows it to handle
massive loads of soil and sand without issue.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And it can remain perfectly stable even when the
dump bed tilts to empty out its contents.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ah! There are striking similarities between dump
trucks and the defense-focused Kongo Yaegaki
style!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I instinctively sensed that as a child and
came to admire the trucks for that reason.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm, yes. In the future, I'll endeavor to embody
the strength and stability of a dump truck!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From that day forward, Yaeno Muteki's running
feels more sturdy somehow.
